name: PUSHING THE LIMITS | | Hitoshi Shinsou
description:
✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ It’s late at night — well past 00:00 — and instead of being in bed like he should be, Hitoshi is in the gym, beating the punching bag until his body threatens to give out. But when he turns around, he’s in for a little treat — because you've been watching him for god-knows-how-long. Plus, your reputation for being the quiet creepy girl doesn’t help anything. ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!
